title: Low on Fire
description: The Low on Fire texture pack is very good and can be used for good PvP.
body:
─────────────────────────────
🔥 Low on Fire Resource Pack 🔥
─────────────────────────────

Experience Minecraft like never before with **Low on Fire** – a lightweight, minimalistic resource pack designed for smooth gameplay and stunning visuals without compromising performance.  

✨ **Features:**  
- Ultra-lightweight textures optimized for low-end devices  
- Smooth fire animations with realistic glow effects  
- Vibrant yet minimalistic color palette  
- Clean and clear UI elements for easier navigation  
- Full compatibility with Minecraft 1.21+  

💡 **Benefits:**  
- Boosts FPS and reduces lag for lower-end PCs and Android devices  
- Enhances visual experience while keeping the classic Minecraft feel  
- Perfect for survival, creative, or building servers  
- Easy to install and fully optimized  

🎯 **Why Choose Low on Fire:**  
Enjoy a perfect balance of aesthetics and performance. Your world, your fire, but without draining your system.  

─────────────────────────────
